summary: Frontend-only validation completed on preview URL. Core homepage, welcome/cookie gating, desktop/mobile navigation, catalog interactions, console sanity, and overflow checks passed.
action_items: No blocking frontend defects found in requested scope.
Optional: replace CookieBanner polling (setInterval) with an event-driven state update for cleaner lifecycle behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code-quality or architecture issues found in reviewed files for this scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://web-constructor-141.preview.emergentagent.com. Welcome gate appears with empty localStorage, accept transitions correctly, cookie banner appears and both accept/reject hide it, desktop+mobile navigation routes work, catalog has 3 models and color/submodel interactions work, no horizontal overflow detected on desktop/mobile, and no relevant JS errors beyond expected aborted external telemetry/challenge requests.
rca of the issue: No application defect reproduced in requested scope. The only repeated console failures were external telemetry/challenge requests (cdn-cgi/posthog) aborted during navigation, non-blocking and expected per test instruction.
